mapper.select:
SELECT ID, TABLE_ID, COL_KEY, COL_LABEL, COL_TYPE, STATUS, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, COL_SELECT_KEY, MENU_ID, SORT_NUM FROM T_SETTING_AD_SEARCH
id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_SETTING_AD_SEARCH( ID, TABLE_ID, COL_KEY, COL_LABEL, COL_TYPE, STATUS, REMARK, COL_SELECT_KEY, MENU_ID, SORT_NUM, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME )VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tableId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{colKey, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{colLabel, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{colType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{colSelectKey, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{menuId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{sortNum, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_SETTING_AD_SEARCH SET TABLE_ID = #{tableId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COL_KEY = #{colKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COL_LABEL = #{colLabel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COL_TYPE = #{colType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REMARK = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COL_SELECT_KEY = #{colSelectKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MENU_ID = #{menuId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, SORT_NUM = #{sortNum, jdbcType=INTEGER}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}
